The '''Home Planet Party''' was a [[Politics/Legends|political]] party that was founded by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[45 BBY/Legends|45 BBY]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]]. Its goals were to [[Farm/Legends|replant]] fields on the planet and gain control of Bandomeer's resources from the off-world corporations that controlled them. Founded by the [[Meerian/Legends|Meerian]] [[VeerTa]], the party controlled the [[Home Planet Mine]] near the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Bandor (city)|Bandor]]. VeerTa was arrested after it was discovered that she had betrayed the group by secretly partnering with [[Xanatos]], a member of the [[Offworld Mining Corporation]], who used her in his [[Mission to Bandomeer|plot]] to attempt to [[Death/Legends|kill]] his former [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]].

==History==
[[File:Bandomeer.jpg|thumb|left|230px|The Home Planet party operated on Bandomeer (pictured).]]
The Home Planet Party was formed as a [[Politics/Legends|political]] party on [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]], a [[Planet/Legends|world]] covered in [[Mining/Legends|mines]], by [[45 BBY/Legends|45 BBY]], and was founded by native [[Meerian/Legends|Meerian]] patriot [[VeerTa]]. In order to achieve their goals of improving Bandomeer, the party first focused on ending the dependence on off-worlders for financial help. Seeking to accomplish this, the Home Planet Party, under the leadership of VeerTa, went into partnership with the [[Arcona Mineral Harvest Corporation]] in order to create a mine of their own that was not controlled by off-world corporations, such as the [[Offworld Mining Corporation]].<ref name="Jedi" />

In 45 BBY, VeerTa, along with [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[SonTag]], [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] Mineral Harvest Corporation member [[Clat'Ha]], and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], met with Offworld Corporation's representative [[Xanatos]], who was also Jinn's former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. During the meeting, Xanatos offered ten percent of Offworld's profits to help the reclamation efforts of the Home Planet Party in order to persuade them that Offworld, which had a tainted history, was sincere in wanting to be friends with the Home Planet Party. However, in the middle of the meeting, a gas explosion occurred at the Home Planet Mine, seriously damaging it and destroying the building where the meeting had been originally scheduled to take place. In the aftermath of the explosion, [[ionite]], a rare material worth much more than the [[azurite]] initially mined at the facility, was found deep in the mine. The explosion also destroyed the stockpile of azurite that they had accumulated, leaving the mine bankrupt.<ref name="Jedi" />

Wanting the profit from the ionite despite their current bankruptcy, VeerTa diverted some of the funds that Xanatos soon gave them to repair the mine to dig for the material. VeerTa, however, joined forces with Xanatos secretly, telling him about the ionite and covertly letting him control the Home Planet Mine; Xanatos then tricked VeerTa and used her to [[Mission to Bandomeer|place]] [[Ion bomb/Legends|ion bombs]] all over Bandomeer. VeerTa's betrayal was discovered after Jinn and the young Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] found that Xanatos was out to [[Death/Legends|kill]] his former [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] by destroying Bandomeer with Jinn still on-world, and stopped Xanatos's ion bombs from detonating, saving the planet.<ref name="Jedi" /> VeerTa was later arrested after it was discovered that she helped Xanatos.<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|54|Home Planet Party}}</ref>

==Organization==
The Home Planet Party's goals were to [[Farm/Legends|regrow fertile fields]] on Bandomeer once again,<ref name="Jedi" /> in order to restore their planet to its original beauty,<ref name="TCSWE" /> and to regain control of the planet's resources, as most of it was owned by off-worlders. Founded by the patriot VeerTa, the group shared the Home Planet Mine with the Arcona Mineral Harvest Corporation.<ref name="Jedi" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Home Planet Party first appeared in [[1999]]'s ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dark Rival]]'', written by [[Jude Watson]].<ref name="Jedi" />
